metadata.description: Claude Code plugins published by marsman-io. A family of phase-aware diagnostic-agent plugins — each ships read-only agents that critique a domain (design, project management, …) through grounded conceptual lenses + a lifecycle taxonomy — plus standalone skill collections.

plugins.name: design-loop-methodology
plugins.description: Four phase-aware diagnostic agents (design-loop, intent-lens, constraint-cascade, hierarchy-budget) that critique UI / design-system surfaces through five conceptual lenses (loop, intent, constraint, hierarchy, lifecycle). Detects bootstrap/apply/audit/tweak/refactor and composes the right skill chain. Ships 11 composable skills.

plugins.name: project-loop-methodology
plugins.description: Four phase-aware diagnostic agents (project-loop, outcome-altitude, project-cascade, priority-budget) that critique agentic product work through PM-derived lenses (loop, outcome altitude, constraint, priority budget, lifecycle). Detects charter/plan/execute/adjust/replan and composes the right skill chain for indie product builders checking whether agent-built work matches intent.

plugins.name: meta-prompt-skills
plugins.description: A flat collection of seven standalone meta-prompt skills: humanizer (strip AI tells from prose), video-distill (video → layered notes), sota-scan (benchmark a project against top peers, every gap names a real project), session-mine (mine recent transcripts for recurring corrections), clarify-deep (gather context then ask deep blind-spot questions), book-to-skill (turn a non-fiction book's method into installable skills), and prompt-improver (improve an existing prompt/skill in auto or interactive mode). No agents — each skill picks its own mode where relevant and auto-routes on its own triggers.

plugins.name: indie-founder-lenses
plugins.description: Four phase-aware, read-only diagnostic lenses for the surfaces a solo founder lives on — launch-readiness-lens, founder-focus-budget, pricing-page-lens, and conversion-intent-lens — each detecting its own phase and critiquing one founder surface (launch readiness, founder focus, pricing, landing-page conversion) against a cited artifact. Not a loop and not a methodology: no orchestrator, no shared lifecycle, no persona — independent critics that accept in-repo or pasted/external artifacts.

plugins.name: release-flow-skills
plugins.description: A collection of git / PR / release-lifecycle skills for shipping software; the first is changelog-from-diff, which turns a git diff into a clean, grouped changelog / release-notes entry, user-invoked and never rewriting history.

plugins.name: frontier-analysis-skills
plugins.description: A flat collection of five codebase-neutral skills for spending an expensive frontier reasoning model well — seam-conformance, layer-trace, contract-drift, boundary-judgment, and invariant-capture — each gathering evidence cheaply, then making one focused reasoning call, then capturing the verdict as a durable rule + test so you spend once and enforce forever. No agents; each skill auto-routes on its own triggers.
